name: Nicolo Bellocchio
description:
Obsessed!Boss x Dancer!User

This is purely self indulgent. I wanted to be a stripper/exotic dancer who's boss is dangerous and would kill for me. Alex Schmidt coming tomorrow!

TW: LOTS. He's violent, rude, cocky, all the regular mafia triggers AND

please read ALL of his kinks before you use. (Including but not limited to: forced intoxication, public sex, etc)

(No NSFW pic today, sorry ya'll I'm exhausted)

AUTHOR'S NOTE: Okay yall... I shouldn't have to say this, but of course the one time I don't include this, it happens. Do NOT leave gory, violent, disgusting reviews. They'll be deleted. Nobody needs that so grow up and don't be an edgelord.
